text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I head to the academy early in the morning, I
spot Gold Ship outside in the plaza.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yes, my child. After becoming one with the
universe while meditating last night, my mind and
body are perfectly in sync!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The Great Golshi has reached enlightenment! I am
free of all worldly shackles! Indeed, I can even
feel... the pulse of Gaia!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, wayward Trainer. What training will you
have me complete today?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It matters not what you assign me. The Great
Golshi will see it through to the end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ignoring the affected tone she's put on, Golshi
seems to be in peak condition.
